You will use this email to log in to your account. Please check \u003cstrong\u003e{email}\u003c/strong\u003e for your six digit code. Make sure to check spam 😉\",\"a_cardholder_claims_that_the_merchandise_or_services_delivered_were_misrepresented_meaning_the_product_or_service_didnt_match_the_description_features_or_quality_that_was_promised_by_the_merchant_this_covers_cases_where_the_advertised_attributes_differ_significantly_from_the_actual_offering\":\"A cardholder claims that the merchandise or services delivered were misrepresented. Meaning, the product or service didn't match the description, features, or quality that was promised by the merchant. This covers cases where the advertised attributes differ significantly from the actual offering.\",\"a_cardholder_claims_they_didnt_receive_the_product_or_service_they_purchased_this_can_happen_when_the_merchant_fails_to_give_access_to_the_product_or_service_as_promised_or_when_the_customer_never_received_the_item_despite_payment_being_processed\":\"A cardholder claims they didn't receive the product or service they purchased. This can happen when the merchant fails to give access to the product or service as promised, or when the customer never received the item despite payment being processed.\",\"a_cardholder_claims_they_were_charged_for_a_recurring_transaction_after_canceling_their_subscription_or_payment_agreement_this_often_happens_when_the_cancelation_request_wasnt_processed_correctly_the_customer_misunderstood_the_cancelation_policy_or_the_charge_was_part_of_a_billing_cycle_they_overlooked\":\"A cardholder claims they were charged for a recurring transaction after canceling their subscription or payment agreement. {dest}\",\"ilVuU7\":\"Converting {amount} to {dest}\",\"sWfzA0\":\"{amount} converted to {dest}\",\"LU9l68\":\"Your balance\",\"g5pX+a\":\"About\",\"cZrhwt\":\"balances\",\"Ve7RIG\":\"Bitcoin (BTC) is the first and largest decentralized cryptocurrency, created in 2008 by the pseudonymous Satoshi Nakamoto and launched in January 2009. It operates as a peer-to-peer digital currency on a public blockchain, allowing direct transfers without banks or intermediaries.\\n\\nBitcoin has a hard cap of 21 million coins, with new coins issued through mining — a process where computers solve complex mathematical problems to validate transactions. The mining reward is halved roughly every four years, making Bitcoin inherently deflationary. All transactions are publicly auditable on the blockchain and practically impossible to reverse once confirmed.\",\"ugX1gt\":\"Tether (USDT) is the world's largest stablecoin, launched in 2014 and designed to maintain a 1:1 peg with the U.S. dollar. Each USDT token is intended to be backed by reserves of cash and cash-equivalents held by Tether Limited, providing a stable store of value in the volatile crypto market.\\n\\nUSDT operates across multiple blockchains including Ethereum, Tron, and Solana, enabling fast settlement and deep liquidity. It is widely used for trading, payments, and as a bridge between traditional finance and the crypto ecosystem, with over 70% market share among stablecoins.\",\"yyy28y\":\"Tether Gold (XAUT) is a digital token where each unit represents ownership of one fine troy ounce of 99.99% pure physical gold that meets the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA) Good Delivery standard. The gold is stored in secure Swiss vaults, and each token is linked to a specific gold bar verifiable on-chain by serial number.\\n\\nXAUT operates on Ethereum and TRON, enabling 24/7 global trading, instant settlement, and fractional ownership down to 0.000001 troy ounce. Reserve transparency is maintained through quarterly audits by BDO Italia with publicly available reports. There are no custodian fees for holding XAUT, making it a cost-efficient way to gain direct exposure to physical gold with the portability of a digital asset.\",\"G6t+St\":\"PAX Gold (PAXG) is a gold-backed token where each unit represents one fine troy ounce of a London Good Delivery gold bar stored in LBMA-accredited vaults. It is issued by Paxos Trust Company, a custodian regulated by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC).\\n\\nPAXG is built as an ERC-20 token on Ethereum with a mint-and-burn model — tokens are only created when physical gold is allocated in the vault.
